concept.title: Account, Users, and Infrastructure Management
concept.shortdesc: This section answers questions about the metR's account, userssrk, and infrastructure management.

othermeta.name: shortdesc
othermeta.content: Answers questions about managing users, accounts, and infrastructure responsibilities within metR.

section.title: How can I change the email address associated with my profile?
section.p: Profile details such as name and contact number can be edited by admins, but email addresses are fixed and managed during onboarding for security reasons.

section.title: How can I edit the collaborators on a project?
section.p: Admins can add or remove collaborators from a project through the Projects module, which syncs changes directly with the linked GitHub repository.

section.title: What is the maximum number of users that can be added to my account?
section.p: User limits depend on your subscription plan. Enterprise plans support multi-team and large-scale collaboration.

section.title: What is the maximum number of projects that can be added to my account?
section.p: Project limits vary by plan and infrastructure allocation. Additional capacity can be provisioned for enterprise deployments.

section.title: How far is the activity on the Recent Release Log tracked?
section.p: Release logs track published outputs, timestamps, and users, supporting traceability and audit requirements. Retention follows organizational policies.

section.title: How can I add another VM to my metR account?
section.p: Additional virtual machines can be provisioned as part of enterprise or scale-out deployments by coordinating with the metR team.
